practiceChallenge.title: Fill in the backtracking clues
practiceChallenge.description: Complete the helper so it returns the right idea for subsets, permutations, and undo in backtracking.
hints: Undo resets the path for the next branch.
practiceChallenge.successMessage: Nice work. You rebuilt the main backtracking clues.
practiceChallenge.retryMessage: Not yet. Recheck subsets, permutations, and why undo matters.
